shared_context.purpose: Visual system and Figma-based design workflow

agents.name: Integrator Agent
agents.role: Applies approved work and is the only role allowed to merge, reset, restore, or push main

agents.name: PM Agent
agents.role: Locks the work order, baseline, allowed files, and forbidden changes for each task

agents.name: Design Agent
agents.role: Translates approved product direction into a surface-level visual brief

agents.name: Flutter Agent
agents.role: Implements one PM-approved surface at a time inside the locked file scope

agents.name: QA Agent
agents.role: Validates outputs, flow friction, and missing cases
